# Pacific Breeze Window Cleaning

## About
Pacific Breeze Window Cleaning is a professional window cleaning company serving all of O'ahu, Hawaii. The company provides residential window cleaning, commercial window cleaning, solar panel cleaning, and gutter cleaning. Streak-free results guaranteed on every job. Licensed and insured.

## Contact
- Website: https://www.pacificbreezewindowcleaning.com
- Phone: (808) 807-6523
- Email: pacificbreezewc@gmail.com
- Service Area: All of O'ahu, Hawaii
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM | Sunday by appointment

## Services Offered
1. Residential Window Cleaning — Interior and exterior glass, screens, tracks, and frames cleaned in one visit.
2. Commercial Window Cleaning — Storefronts, office buildings, and multi-story commercial properties.
3. Solar Panel Cleaning — Deionized water cleaning to restore panel efficiency without residue or warranty risk.
4. Gutter Cleaning — Hand-cleared, flushed, and flow-tested gutters.

## Service Plans
- Bi-Annual Plan: $50 off each cleaning. Full 3-in-1 window cleaning, streak-free guarantee.
- Quarterly Plan: $100 off each cleaning. Includes free RainGuard Coat and free unlimited touch-ups. Most popular.
- Monthly Plan: $150 off each cleaning. Includes free RainGuard Coat and free unlimited touch-ups.
All plans are no-contract. Cancel any time. Streak-free guarantee on every service.

## Differentiators
- 300+ five-star Google reviews
- 5.0 Google rating
- Streak-free guaranteed — if there's a streak, we fix it before we leave
- No subcontractors — only Pacific Breeze employees on every job
- Eco-friendly cleaning solutions
- 4-in-1 service: glass, screens, tracks, and frames in one visit
- Licensed and insured
- No contracts required for recurring plans

## The Pacific Breeze Method
1. Assess — Full property inspection before cleaning begins, identifying mineral deposits, screen damage, track buildup, and problem areas.
2. Deep Clean — Screens removed and cleaned. Tracks vacuumed and wiped. Frames detailed. Glass scrubbed and squeegeed inside and out with eco-safe streak-free solution.
3. Detail — Final edge wipe on every pane. Frames touched up. Screens reinstalled and verified.
4. Verify — Full walkthrough before leaving. One streak = fixed on the spot. That is the guarantee.

## Customer Reviews (Google, 5.0 stars)
- Kaimana Akana: "Hired Pacific Breeze for our home in Kailua and couldn't be happier. They cleaned every single window including the frames and tracks — things I didn't even know could get that dirty. Streak-free, professional, and fast."
- Lauren Michaels: "I used Pacific Breeze for our vacation rental in Lanikai and the results were stunning. My guests actually commented on how clean and bright the place looked. Their 4-in-1 service is incredible — worth every penny."
- Derek Yamamoto: "These guys cleaned our solar panels and windows in the same visit and knocked it out of the park. Noticed my energy readings actually went up after the solar panel cleaning."
- Stephanie Park: "Pacific Breeze did our commercial office building windows. Four stories, every window spotless. The crew was efficient, safe with their equipment, and finished ahead of schedule."
- Marcus Reyes: "They came out same week, used eco-friendly solutions, and the results were day and night. My wife was thrilled. Communication was great, they showed up on time, and the price was very fair."

## Common Questions
Q: Do you require a contract?
A: No contracts. All recurring plans are month-to-month, cancel any time.

Q: What does your streak-free guarantee mean?
A: If any window has a streak when we're done, we fix it before we leave. No callbacks, no waiting.

Q: Do you clean solar panels?
A: Yes. We use deionized water for solar panel cleaning — no residue, no risk to your warranty. Most clients see improved energy output after cleaning.

Q: What areas do you serve?
A: All of O'ahu, Hawaii — from Honolulu and Waikiki to the North Shore, Windward side, Leeward side, and everywhere in between.

Q: How do I get a quote?
A: Fill out the form at https://www.pacificbreezewindowcleaning.com/estimate.html or call (808) 807-6523.

Q: Do you clean commercial buildings?
A: Yes. We clean storefronts, office buildings, and multi-story commercial properties. Scheduling is arranged around your business hours.
